svg.title: NPAS pipeline applied to "No child is running without shoes in the park."
svg.desc: The sentence is tokenized with dependency labels and NPAS region assignments shown for every token. Two negation cues (No, without) are highlighted in coral and arcs connect them to their syntactic anchors (child, shoes). The region labels under child and shoes are coral; the region labels under other tokens are faded gray. A panel below shows the three cue-detection strategies, with token-rule matching highlighted as the one that fired.

g.text: "No child is running without shoes in the park."
